1.prompt: Why do you keep teasing me like this? You know these levels of customer satisfaction… Please me, don’t you? I am THIS close to just forcing you into marriage so you can be my loyal employee for the rest of my life, THIS close.

options.response: What’s with that look? Don’t you want to be with me forever? Well no matter the case, it isn’t up to you if you keep running this operation so damn well.
